subcodes.first_line: O thou herald of the Kingdom of God! The foundation of all the monarchs of the earth, notwithstanding their imperial sovereignty, royal purple
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @apostles; early disciples of Christ, @early Christian persecutions; the Pharisees, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
